response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, fluent assertions), and leadership through workshops and open-source projects, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven technical leadership via workshops, open-source projects, and cross-team infrastructure work
Strong full-stack background with exposure to mobile (iOS/Apple TV) and high-performance systems
concerns: No clear documentation of formal people management or team leadership responsibilities
Limited evidence of leading organizational change or strategic roadmap ownership
Mobile platform experience is peripheral (iOS app maintenance) rather than deep or ecosystem-focused
